steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The clause after the blank states that years pass between a soil’s selection and its official designation, showing that this time gap happens often.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Choice A, In many cases, directly signals that the time gap occurs frequently, matching the clue that years often pass. The other three either suggest similarity, emphasis, or a conclusion, none of which convey the idea of frequency. That matches choice A — A is correct.
